title: Roasted Italian Orecchiette
description: A hearty, flavorful pasta dish featuring roasted vegetables and Italian seasonings.
instructions: Toss the sliced zucchini with 1 tbsp olive oil, salt, and Italian seasoning on a baking sheet. Roast for 20 minutes.
Toss the cherry tomatoes with 1 tbsp olive oil, salt, and Italian seasoning on a baking sheet. Roast for 10-12 minutes.
Cook the orecchiette pasta according to the package instructions.
In a large skillet, sauté the minced garlic and chopped coriander in 1 tbsp olive oil until fragrant.
Add the roasted zucchini and cherry tomatoes to the skillet. Stir to combine.
Stir in the cooked orecchiette pasta, roasted red peppers, and grated Parmesan cheese.
Serve hot, garnished with additional Parmesan cheese and Italian seasoning if desired.
